'''noyamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocabularial|vocabularial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocabularial|vocabularial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noyamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyamithi|noyamithi]] || [[word:noyamiji|noyamiji]] || [[word:noyamishi|noyamishi]] || [[word:noyamiki|noyamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyamuthuthu|noyamuthuthu]] || [[word:noyamujuju|noyamujuju]] || [[word:noyamushushu|noyamushushu]] || [[word:noyamukuku|noyamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyamuthu|noyamuthu]] || [[word:noyamuju|noyamuju]] || [[word:noyamushu|noyamushu]] || [[word:noyamuku|noyamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyamufthuf|noyamufthuf]] || [[word:noyamufjuf|noyamufjuf]] || [[word:noyamufshuf|noyamufshuf]] || [[word:noyamufkuf|noyamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyamethe|noyamethe]] || [[word:noyameje|noyameje]] || [[word:noyameshe|noyameshe]] || [[word:noyameke|noyameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyamothotho|noyamothotho]] || [[word:noyamojojo|noyamojojo]] || [[word:noyamoshosho|noyamoshosho]] || [[word:noyamokoko|noyamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyamotho|noyamotho]] || [[word:noyamojo|noyamojo]] || [[word:noyamosho|noyamosho]] || [[word:noyamoko|noyamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyamofthof|noyamofthof]] || [[word:noyamofjof|noyamofjof]] || [[word:noyamofshof|noyamofshof]] || [[word:noyamofkof|noyamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfthÃŸf|noyamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfjÃŸf|noyamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfshÃŸf|noyamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfkÃŸf|noyamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|noyamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|noyamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|noyamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|noyamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfthÃŸf|noyamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfjÃŸf|noyamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfshÃŸf|noyamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfkÃŸf|noyamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfthÃŸf|noyamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfjÃŸf|noyamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfshÃŸf|noyamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyamÃŸfkÃŸf|noyamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyamÃḊthÃḊ|noyamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:noyamÃḊjÃḊ|noyamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:noyamÃḊshÃḊ|noyamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:noyamÃḊkÃḊ|noyamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyamathatha|noyamathatha]] || [[word:noyamajaja|noyamajaja]] || [[word:noyamashasha|noyamashasha]] || [[word:noyamakaka|noyamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyamatha|noyamatha]] || [[word:noyamaja|noyamaja]] || [[word:noyamasha|noyamasha]] || [[word:noyamaka|noyamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyamafthaf|noyamafthaf]] || [[word:noyamafjaf|noyamafjaf]] || [[word:noyamafshaf|noyamafshaf]] || [[word:noyamafkaf|noyamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noyamasha|noyamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noyamshÃḋsha|noyamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noyamrosha|noyamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noyamusha|noyamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noyamyasha|noyamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoyamnkshÃḋsha|gonoyamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoyamnkrosha|gonoyamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoyamnkmusha|gonoyamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoyamnkyasha|gonoyamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:noyayamasha|noyayamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noyayamshÃḋsha|noyayamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noyayamrosha|noyayamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noyayamusha|noyayamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noyayamyasha|noyayamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoyayamnkshÃḋsha|gonoyayamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoyayamnkrosha|gonoyayamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoyayamnkmusha|gonoyayamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoyayamnkyasha|gonoyayamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:neyÃḊmasha|neyÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:neyÃḊmshÃḋsha|neyÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:neyÃḊmrosha|neyÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:neyÃḊmusha|neyÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:neyÃḊmyasha|neyÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goneyÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|goneyÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goneyÃḊmnkrosha|goneyÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goneyÃḊmnkmusha|goneyÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goneyÃḊmnkyasha|goneyÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:noyfamasha|noyfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noyfamshÃḋsha|noyfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noyfamrosha|noyfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noyfamusha|noyfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noyfamyasha|noyfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoyfamnkshÃḋsha|gonoyfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoyfamnkrosha|gonoyfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoyfamnkmusha|gonoyfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoyfamnkyasha|gonoyfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
